description: For the free-spirited cosmo male, this nike fragrances Casual fragrance is inspired by the essence of the nike fragrances brand. This eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, is best for casual outings and lazy weekends. Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
